requirement_topic.en: AC Connector Standard — ABNT NBR IEC 62196 (Type 2 / Type 3C)
requirement_topic.zh: 交流连接器标准——ABNT NBR IEC 62196（Type 2 / Type 3C）
requirement_topic.zht: 交流連接器標準——ABNT NBR IEC 62196（Type 2 / Type 3C）

summary.en: Brazil has adopted IEC 62196-2 as ABNT NBR IEC 62196-2 for AC EV charging connectors. Brazil officially standardised on the Type 2 connector (IEC 62196-2 Configuration EE — the 'Mennekes' connector) as the national standard for AC EV charging, following a resolution process by ABNT's EV charging technical committee. This was formalised through ABNT CT-208 (Technical Committee for Electric Mobility) work. AC Mode 2 and Mode 3 charging equipment exported to Brazil must be equipped with or support IEC 62196-2 Type 2 connectors. Note: some earlier Brazilian AC EV chargers used Type 3C (Italian pattern) connectors — installers should verify current market predominance, though Type 2 is the current ABNT standard.
summary.zh: 巴西已将IEC 62196-2采纳为ABNT NBR IEC 62196-2，适用于交流充电连接器。巴西经ABNT电动汽车充电技术委员会决议程序，正式以Type 2连接器（IEC 62196-2配置EE，即'Mennekes'连接器）作为交流充电国家标准。该标准由ABNT CT-208（电动出行技术委员会）推进实施。出口巴西的交流模式2和模式3充电设备须配备或支持IEC 62196-2 Type 2连接器。注意：部分早期巴西交流充电设备使用Type 3C（意大利式）连接器——安装方应核实当前市场主流，尽管Type 2已为现行ABNT标准。
summary.zht: 巴西已將IEC 62196-2採納為ABNT NBR IEC 62196-2，適用於交流充電連接器。巴西經ABNT電動汽車充電技術委員會決議程序，正式以Type 2連接器（IEC 62196-2配置EE，即「Mennekes」連接器）作為交流充電國家標準。該標準由ABNT CT-208（電動出行技術委員會）推進實施。出口巴西的交流模式2和模式3充電設備須配備或支持IEC 62196-2 Type 2連接器。注意：部分早期巴西交流充電設備使用Type 3C（意大利式）連接器——安裝方應核實當前市場主流，儘管Type 2已為現行ABNT標準。

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR IEC 62196-2 — Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets — Conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for AC pin and contact-tube accessories (Brazilian adoption of IEC 62196-2; specifies Type 2 as Brazilian standard)
IEC 62196-2:2022 — Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets — Part 2 (current IEC edition)

summary.en: China's AC EV charging connector standard is GB/T 20234.2-2015 (Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler), which defines a unique Chinese AC connector configuration incompatible with IEC 62196-2 Type 2. The Chinese AC coupler uses a 7-pin single-phase or 3-phase configuration with different dimensional and electrical contact arrangements. Chinese AC EV chargers equipped with GB/T 20234.2 connectors require hardware connector replacement before they can be used in Brazil.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电连接器标准为GB/T 20234.2-2015（电动汽车传导充电用连接装置——第2部分：交流充电接口），定义了与IEC 62196-2 Type 2不兼容的中国专用交流连接器配置。中国交流耦合器采用不同外形尺寸和电气接触布局的7针单相或三相配置。配备GB/T 20234.2连接器的中国交流充电设备在巴西使用前需更换连接器硬件。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電連接器標準為GB/T 20234.2-2015（電動汽車傳導充電用連接裝置——第2部分：交流充電接口），定義了與IEC 62196-2 Type 2不相容的中國專用交流連接器配置。中國交流耦合器採用不同外形尺寸和電氣接觸佈局的7針單相或三相配置。配備GB/T 20234.2連接器的中國交流充電設備在巴西使用前需更換連接器硬體。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler (Chinese-specific AC connector; incompatible with IEC 62196-2 Type 2)

gap.en: This is a hardware incompatibility gap. Chinese AC EV chargers use GB/T 20234.2 connectors that are physically and electrically different from IEC 62196-2 Type 2 connectors required in Brazil. Exporters must redesign or re-equip charging units with IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) connectors. If a confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification scheme for EVSE is in force (verify portaria.inmetro.gov.br — not confirmed as of 2026-06-12), the connector configuration would need to be included in the certified product scope. Furthermore, Brazil's grid uses 60 Hz (and both 127 V and 220 V single-phase), which requires verification of charger control pilot signal timing compatibility.
gap.zh: 这是一个硬件不兼容差距。中国交流充电设备使用的GB/T 20234.2连接器在物理和电气特性上均与巴西要求的IEC 62196-2 Type 2连接器不同。出口商须重新设计充电设备或更换为IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）连接器。若针对EVSE的INMETRO强制认证方案获得确认（须在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核实——截至2026年6月12日未能确认），连接器配置须纳入认证产品范围。另外，巴西电网采用60Hz（及127V和220V单相），须验证充电设备控制引导信号时序的兼容性。
gap.zht: 這是一個硬體不相容差距。中國交流充電設備使用的GB/T 20234.2連接器在物理和電氣特性上均與巴西要求的IEC 62196-2 Type 2連接器不同。出口商須重新設計充電設備或更換為IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）連接器。若針對EVSE的INMETRO強制認證方案獲得確認（須在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核實——截至2026年6月12日未能確認），連接器配置須納入認證產品範圍。另外，巴西電網採用60Hz（及127V和220V單相），須驗證充電設備控制導引信號時序的相容性。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62196-2 Type 2 is the Brazilian standard AC connector for EV charging under ABNT NBR IEC 62196-2; hardware incompatibility with GB/T 20234.2 confirmed — connector redesign required; whether INMETRO compulsory certification for EVSE is confirmed must be verified at portaria.inmetro.gov.br
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestic standard — GB/T 20234.2-2015 AC coupler required for Chinese domestic market; incompatible with Type 2

source.publisher: ABNT — Associação Brasileira de Normas Técnicas

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazil has standardised on IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) connectors for AC EV charging under ABNT NBR IEC 62196-2. Chinese GB/T 20234.2 AC connectors are physically incompatible — hardware redesign is required. This represents one of the highest-impact gaps for China-to-Brazil EV charger exports regardless of certification scheme status.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】巴西已依据ABNT NBR IEC 62196-2将IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）连接器标准化为交流充电标准。中国GB/T 20234.2交流连接器在物理上不兼容——需进行硬件重新设计。无论认证方案状态如何，这都是中国充电设备出口巴西影响最大的差距之一。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】巴西已依據ABNT NBR IEC 62196-2將IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）連接器標準化為交流充電標準。中國GB/T 20234.2交流連接器在物理上不相容——需進行硬體重新設計。無論認證方案狀態如何，這都是中國充電設備出口巴西影響最大的差距之一。

requirement_topic.en: DC Connector Standard — CCS2 (Combined Charging System Type 2) in Brazil
requirement_topic.zh: 直流连接器标准——巴西CCS2（组合充电系统2型）
requirement_topic.zht: 直流連接器標準——巴西CCS2（組合充電系統2型）

summary.en: For DC fast charging in Brazil, the Combined Charging System Type 2 (CCS2, also known as Combo 2) is the adopted standard, per ABNT NBR IEC 62196-3 (Dimensional compatibility for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers). CCS2 combines the Type 2 AC inlet (IEC 62196-2) with two additional DC power pins, forming the combined CCS2 DC coupler. This is the same CCS2 standard used in Europe and is endorsed by major automotive OEMs operating in Brazil (Volkswagen, Mercedes-Benz, BMW, etc.). CHAdeMO DC connectors are also present in the Brazilian market (Japanese/Korean vehicles) but are declining in new installations.
summary.zh: 巴西直流快充采用组合充电系统2型（CCS2，又称Combo 2）作为标准，依据ABNT NBR IEC 62196-3（直流及交直流针型和管型车辆耦合器的尺寸兼容性）。CCS2将Type 2交流插座（IEC 62196-2）与两个额外的直流电力引脚组合，形成CCS2直流耦合器。这与欧洲使用的CCS2标准相同，并得到在巴西运营的主要汽车OEM厂商（大众、奔驰、宝马等）的认可。CHAdeMO直流连接器（日韩车辆）也在巴西市场存在，但在新设施中呈下降趋势。
summary.zht: 巴西直流快充採用組合充電系統2型（CCS2，又稱Combo 2）作為標準，依據ABNT NBR IEC 62196-3（直流及交直流針型和管型車輛耦合器的尺寸相容性）。CCS2將Type 2交流插座（IEC 62196-2）與兩個額外的直流電力引腳組合，形成CCS2直流耦合器。這與歐洲使用的CCS2標準相同，並得到在巴西運營的主要汽車OEM廠商（大眾、奔馳、寶馬等）的認可。CHAdeMO直流連接器（日韓車輛）也在巴西市場存在，但在新設施中呈下降趨勢。

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR IEC 62196-3 — Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets — Part 3: Dimensional compatibility for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers (Brazilian adoption of IEC 62196-3; CCS2 / Combo 2)
IEC 62196-3:2022 — Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets — Part 3 (current IEC edition)

summary.en: China's DC charging connector standard is GB/T 20234.3-2023 (Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler), which defines a Chinese-specific DC connector with a different pin arrangement and communication protocol (based on GB/T 27930 CAN bus) from CCS2 (which uses DIN 70121 / ISO 15118 communication). The Chinese GB/T DC connector is not physically interchangeable with CCS2, and the communication protocols are incompatible without hardware and firmware redesign.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电连接器标准为GB/T 20234.3-2023（电动汽车传导充电用连接装置——第3部分：直流充电接口），定义了具有不同引脚布局的中国专用直流连接器，其通信协议（基于GB/T 27930 CAN总线）与CCS2（使用DIN 70121/ISO 15118通信）不同。中国GB/T直流连接器与CCS2在物理上不可互换，且在未进行硬件和固件重新设计的情况下，通信协议不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電連接器標準為GB/T 20234.3-2023（電動汽車傳導充電用連接裝置——第3部分：直流充電接口），定義了具有不同引腳佈局的中國專用直流連接器，其通信協議（基於GB/T 27930 CAN總線）與CCS2（使用DIN 70121/ISO 15118通信）不同。中國GB/T直流連接器與CCS2在物理上不可互換，且在未進行硬體和韌體重新設計的情況下，通信協議不相容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler (Chinese DC connector; supports up to 1500 V / 800 A; incompatible with CCS2)
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocol between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles (CAN-based; incompatible with ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 used by CCS2)

gap.en: Chinese DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 connectors and GB/T 27930 CAN-based communication protocol — both are incompatible with Brazil's CCS2 standard. This requires: (1) physical hardware redesign of the DC coupler; (2) firmware upgrade to support ISO 15118 or DIN 70121 communication protocol. This is a significant engineering change, not a documentation-only gap. If a confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification scheme for EVSE is in force (verify portaria.inmetro.gov.br — not confirmed as of 2026-06-12), re-certification with CCS2 connector under that scheme would also be required. Exporters should note that some Chinese EV charger manufacturers already produce CCS2 variants for European export — those variants are the starting point for Brazilian market adaptation, not the domestic GB/T variant.
gap.zh: 中国直流快充设备使用GB/T 20234.3连接器和GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信协议——两者均与巴西CCS2标准不兼容。这要求：（1）直流耦合器的物理硬件重新设计；（2）固件升级以支持ISO 15118或DIN 70121通信协议。这是一项重大工程变更，而非仅文件差距。若针对EVSE的INMETRO强制认证方案获得确认（须在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核实——截至2026年6月12日未能确认），还须以CCS2连接器在该方案下重新认证。出口商应注意，部分中国充电设备制造商已针对欧洲出口生产CCS2型号——这些型号是适配巴西市场的起点，而非国内GB/T型号。
gap.zht: 中國直流快充設備使用GB/T 20234.3連接器和GB/T 27930 CAN總線通信協議——兩者均與巴西CCS2標準不相容。這要求：（1）直流耦合器的物理硬體重新設計；（2）韌體升級以支持ISO 15118或DIN 70121通信協議。這是一項重大工程變更，而非僅文件差距。若針對EVSE的INMETRO強制認證方案獲得確認（須在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核實——截至2026年6月12日未能確認），還須以CCS2連接器在該方案下重新認證。出口商應注意，部分中國充電設備製造商已針對歐洲出口生產CCS2型號——這些型號是適配巴西市場的起點，而非國內GB/T型號。

mandatory_status.target: CCS2 is the Brazilian standard DC connector under ABNT NBR IEC 62196-3 — hardware incompatibility with GB/T 20234.3 confirmed; whether INMETRO compulsory certification for EVSE requires CCS2 in scope must be verified at portaria.inmetro.gov.br (not confirmed as of 2026-06-12)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestic standard — GB/T 20234.3-2023 required for Chinese domestic DC charging; physically and electrically incompatible with CCS2

source.publisher: ABNT — Associação Brasileira de Normas Técnicas

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazil uses CCS2 (IEC 62196-3 Combo 2) for DC fast charging under ABNT NBR IEC 62196-3. Chinese GB/T 20234.3 DC connectors are physically and protocol-incompatible with CCS2 — hardware redesign and firmware changes are required. This is among the largest engineering gaps for Chinese DC charger exports to Brazil. Manufacturers with existing CCS2 variants (produced for EU export) should use those as the baseline for Brazilian market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】巴西依据ABNT NBR IEC 62196-3采用CCS2（IEC 62196-3 Combo 2）用于直流快充。中国GB/T 20234.3直流连接器在物理和协议方面均与CCS2不兼容——需进行硬件重新设计和固件修改。这是中国直流充电设备出口巴西工程差距最大的领域之一。已有CCS2型号（为欧洲出口生产）的制造商应以此为基础进行巴西市场适配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】巴西依據ABNT NBR IEC 62196-3採用CCS2（IEC 62196-3 Combo 2）用於直流快充。中國GB/T 20234.3直流連接器在物理和協議方面均與CCS2不相容——需進行硬體重新設計和韌體修改。這是中國直流充電設備出口巴西工程差距最大的領域之一。已有CCS2型號（為歐洲出口生產）的製造商應以此為基礎進行巴西市場適配。
